PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITTLER, MENDELSON, FASTIFF, TICHY & MATHIASON A PROFESSIONAL CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOFF, RAOUL $12,589.53 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,589.53, PLUS INTEREST THEREON AT 10% PER ANNUM FROM 30-NOV-92 UNTIL JUDGMENT IS TAKEN HEREIN ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE JUDGMENTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LITTLER, MENDELSON, FASTIFF, TICHY & MATHIASON A PROFESSIONAL CORP HEARING SET FOR APR-07-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING CONSOLIDATED JUDGMENT ENTERED. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM GABIL ENTERPRISES, TR, AN ORGANIZATION OF UNKNOWN ENTITY AND RAOUL GOFF, AN INDIVIDUAL, AS DOE 1 AND EACH OF THEM, BOTH JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, THE FOLLOWING SUMS: PRINCIPAL - $12,589.53; INTEREST - $552.00; ADDITIONAL INTEREST - $1,510.74; COSTS - $119.00; ADDITIONAL COSTS - $385.00 FOR A TOTAL OF $15,156.27.
